instruction.en: Press and hold the reset button for 6 seconds. When the indicator light flashes it is in pairing mode.
instruction.nl: Druk 6 seconden op de reset knop. Wacht tot de led gaat knipperen.

driver.reason: Fallback for unmatched devices with PIDs: TS0601, TS0225, CK-BL702-MWS-01(7016), ZP-301Z, TS110E, TS0004
